title: assert() failure (or invalid error code) caused by opening statement transaction on read-only database with active read statements
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: opening statement transaction on read-only database
